rationale: For Portugal, the most relevant signal remains the Iran-US deal trajectory affecting EU energy prices; Lebanon strikes sustain uncertainty but no qualitative breakthrough changes the picture for a western EU resident.

top_events.title: Iran claims US deal near; Israel strikes Lebanon continue
top_events.summary: An Iran-US deal would lower EU energy costs benefiting Portugal's economy and households, but fighting in Lebanon signals the deal is not yet secured. Energy price relief remains uncertain.

top_events.title: Global displacement hits 117 million
top_events.summary: Record displacement figures could eventually increase migration flows toward EU including Portugal, though the direct near-term impact on Portugal remains limited.

top_events.title: US restricts Anthropic AI for foreign nationals
top_events.summary: US AI access restrictions for non-Americans could affect Portuguese businesses and researchers using US AI tools, a minor but new development in transatlantic tech relations.
